name: Bruchetta at Deerhill Inn
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup olive oil (to which 1 slivered garlic clove has been added)
recipeInstructions:
Slice the loaf into 4-3/4 inch thick pieces. Brush one side of each with oil and place on a hot grill or broiler until toasted. Brush the other side with oil, turn, and toast. Remove from grill.
Slice the eggplant into 1/2 inch slices. Cook in the same manner as the bread.
Place each slice of toasted bread on a cookie sheet. Top each with pesto.
On top of each slice of eggplant, place one piece of roasted pepper and one slice of mozzarella cheese.
Bake in a 450 oven until the cheese melts. Serve immediately on a bed of marinara sauce. Serves 4.
Deerhill Inn & Restaurant
West Dover, Vermont
